notes: Initialized 2026-05-30 from brief.md (kiro-discovery). Path C single spec; full version-pinned lifecycle + atomic hot-swap IN scope (operator override of the §14.11 #1 'moot-for-paper' default). Claims the previously-floating telemetry row-assembly + run_id/walk_forward_window injection seam. Five internal task clusters (process-loop/scheduler, gate-orchestrator, telemetry-row-assembler, lifecycle-manager, command-surface). Depends: broker-cfd-adapter, reactive-signal-model, decision-trace-telemetry, survival-gate. 5 design-time open questions captured in brief.md (non-blocking, for /kiro-spec-design).
